items.step: Export current completed plan snapshot and replace .step/st-plan.jsonl with the five-idea wave constraints
items.notes: Export the completed pre-wave snapshot, replace the durable plan, and keep one active item while execution begins.

items.step: Introduce explicit internal machine vocabulary in runtime and surface code without changing the pending-owner-first public model
items.notes: Refactor internal naming/comments in src/raw_kernel.zig and src/raw_surface.zig so code reads like the documented machine model.

items.step: Publish the contract matrix in README and docs/semantics.md, including the semantics-to-proof matrix
items.notes: README gets the concise user-facing matrix; docs/semantics.md gets the fuller operational and proof matrix.

items.step: Harden driver-boundary docs and tests so shift.driver remains explicitly additive
items.notes: Strengthen examples/tests/docs around driver semantics without promoting a session-primary model.

items.step: Expand semantic proof coverage for cancellation, discontinuation, nested bubbling, guards, and unresolved-owner drain behavior
items.notes: Add focused tests and compile-fail/size updates only if intended API surfaces change.

items.step: Align research docs to the finalized machine vocabulary and pending-owner-first public model
items.notes: Keep research docs in sync with implementation and outward-facing docs without widening scope into a session-primary redesign.

items.step: Unify semantic closure with the warmed perf contract in docs and proof scripts with a hard 5% gate
items.notes: Make the warmed benchmark contract explicit in docs and keep both tracked benchmark paths within 5%.

items.step: Run the full closure suite, refresh proof artifacts as needed, and fail the wave on semantic or perf drift
items.notes: Closure requires tests, compile-fail, size-check, docs-sanity, examples, st integrity, and warmed perf proof.

comments.author: codex
comments.text: Closure suite passed except the refreshed warmed perf proof is unstable: three repeated proof runs produced bench delta_pct values of -4.88, -5.93, and -6.88 while bench_first_suspend stayed within threshold; leaving st-008 in_progress and restoring the tracked baseline artifact.

items.step: Package the single PR with scoped commits, proof summary, and final st completion notes
items.notes: One PR, but commit boundaries should stay reviewable and proof-backed.
